Description: Walking through the endless vermilion torii gates of Fushimi Inari Shrine.
White buildings with blue domes overlooking the calm Aegean Sea.
The ancient Incan citadel set high in the Andes Mountains.
The turquoise waters of Moraine Lake surrounded by snowy peaks.
Elephants walking through the tall grass of the savanna.
The bright neon lights and crowds of Times Square.
Vibrant coral reefs teeming with underwater life.
Green aurora borealis dancing over a snowy landscape.
The famous Treasury carved into the red sandstone rock face.
Colorful houses stacked on the steep cliffs of Positano.
